original_query: select * from emp where empno > ANY (  select deptno from dept where emp.job = dept.name);
rewritten_query:
SELECT *
FROM emp
WHERE empno > (
    SELECT MIN(deptno)
    FROM dept
    WHERE emp.job = dept.name
);

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace the ANY operator with a MIN function in the subquery to convert it to a scalar subquery, which can be more efficiently executed
The rewritten query maintains the same logic but reduces the number of comparisons from checking all deptnos per emp row to just checking against the minimum value
